title: MoreBread
description: MoreBread adds more bread types to minecraft.
body:
# More Bread

![MoreBread Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vxIh3vP9/images/d17f3661c7ecc661805371d11a6e533251ffa253.png)

More Bread is a 1.20.4 Fabric/Quilt mod to add more bread. The catalog of craft recipes is in the image tab. The current added items are:
* Cinnamon Bun
* Pancakes
* Jelly Filled Bun
* Blueberry Muffin
* Butter
* Chocolate Donuts
* Blueberries and naturally-spawning blueberry bushes.

### Art Credit: https://www.artstation.com/artwork/DANRN0
